subject: Fermi GBM trigger 458312518/150711543 is not a GRB
body:
Hoi-Fung Yu (MPE) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 458312518/150711543
at 13:01:54.13 UT on 11 July 2015, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact
not due to a GRB. This trigger is accidental."
